name: Personal budget create + duplicate-period guard
description: Worker create-handler accepts a discriminated `CreateBudgetRequest` union by `scope`. Personal create requires `scope='personal'`, `ownerUserId === currentUser.id`, and `currencyCode`; conflict check uses the new `findPersonalBudgetByPeriod`. Household create path is preserved. Audit log stores `household_id = null` for personal events.

planned: Zod refine rule: exactly one of `householdId` (scope household) or `ownerUserId` (scope personal).
Integration test in `apps/worker/test/integration/budgets-personal-scope.spec.ts` covers personal create happy path + 409 on duplicate period + cross-user owner rejection.
